title: 7.5-Magnitude Quake Is Largest to Hit Venezuela in More Than a Century
summary_full: The U.S. Geological Survey estimated that it could be far deadlier than a 7.7-magnitude earthquake that struck the country in 1900.
summary_public: The U.S. Geological Survey estimated that it could be far deadlier than a 7.7-magnitude earthquake that struck the country in 1900.
